narrative:
Monroe Twp/Vil (precinct in Harrison County) has 642 registered voters, with 60.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.5 percentage points.
